title: How to Build a Business Using AI: From Idea to Launch in One Day
summary: A YouTube video demonstrating Rocket 1.0, a platform designed to solve context loss between AI tools in workflows. The creator tests Rocket's ability to support rapid startup prototyping from idea to MVP by integrating research, notes, code generation, and team collaboration.
writeup: The video walks through Rocket 1.0, a platform built to address context loss that occurs when work moves between separate AI tools in a workflow. AI Master tests whether Rocket can carry an idea to an MVP in a single day by combining research, notes, code generation, and team collaboration in one place. The central problem it targets is preserved context across these stages, rather than restarting prompts and information at each handoff. The demonstration frames rapid startup prototyping as the use case for measuring how well the integration holds up end to end.
